parsed_output.rephrased_problem: Reduce the average time to complete the monthly financial close process from the current 10 business days to 5 business days or less within the next 6 months, while maintaining zero increase in reconciliation errors.
assumptions: The finance team consists of 8–12 members who currently perform manual data entry and reconciliation using Excel and an ERP system.
Historical financial close data (invoices, receipts, journal entries) are stored digitally as PDFs, scanned images, and CSV exports.
The organization permits the use of cloud-based AI services for internal data processing.
parsed_output.solution: AI‑powered automated document extraction and transaction matching (RAG‑enabled OCR + classification) that reads invoices/receipts, extracts key fields, and auto‑reconciles them against ERP ledger entries.
key_features: Intelligent OCR with confidence scoring for invoice data extraction
Rule‑based and ML classification to map extracted data to GL accounts
Automated suggestion of matching ledger entries with a confidence threshold
data_needed: ERP transaction logs and journal entries (CSV/DB export)
Manual reconciliation logs for supervised training
success_metrics: Average monthly close time ≤5 business days (target 50% reduction)
Manual data‑entry effort reduced by ≥60% (measured by logged hours)
Reconciliation error rate ≤0.5% (no increase from baseline)
implementation_steps: Gather and label a training set of 5,000+ invoices/receipts with key fields (date, amount, vendor, PO).
Fine‑tune a pre‑trained OCR model (e.g., LayoutLMv3) and build a classification model for GL mapping.
Develop an integration layer that streams extracted data into the ERP, presents match suggestions, and logs user approvals.
Pilot the system on one business unit for 2 months, measure KPIs, and iterate.
Roll out organization‑wide with training and monitoring dashboards.
risks: OCR accuracy may drop on low‑quality scans, leading to false matches and manual rework.
Data privacy regulations may restrict uploading sensitive financial documents to third‑party AI services.

parsed_output.rephrased_requirement: No requirement text was provided; unable to generate a concrete engineering specification.
open_questions: What is the exact product functionality (e.g., file upload, Q&A, search) that needs to be implemented?
What are the detailed constraints for inputs, outputs, performance, security, and compliance that will drive the system design?
